instruction:
Find the slope and $y$ intercept for each of the following lines.
For $3 y-12x=6 \ \ $, slope=[ANS] and y intercept=[ANS]. For $y=8x+3 \ \ $, slope=[ANS] and y intercept=[ANS]. For $3 y-24x=-15 \ $, slope=[ANS] and y intercept=[ANS]. For $3 y+12x=6\ $, slope=[ANS] and y intercept=[ANS]. For $y=5x+1 \ $, slope=[ANS] and y intercept=[ANS].
